message:
feat(platform): add platform-identity module for OS/arch normalisation

Centralise OS and architecture name mapping (e.g. macos->darwin,
aarch64->arm64) and canonical User-Agent construction into
src/platform.rs so providers share one source of truth instead of
duplicating hard-coded strings.

Functions: os_name(), arch_name(), platform_tag(), pi_user_agent(),
pi_user_agent_with(). Includes comprehensive unit tests.
Registered in lib.rs alphabetically among existing modules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
